It is a short, chubby, and has short, pointed, brown ears and large copper-brown eyes. It has a rounded, pointed snout with a small black nose and two small, pointed teeth visible in its upper jaw.

It is a short, chubby, and has short, pointed, brown ears and large copper-brown eyes. It has a rounded, pointed snout with a small black nose and two small, pointed teeth visible in its upper jaw.
